metadata.title: Freelance vs Web Agency: How to Choose in 2026
metadata.description: Freelance or web agency? Compare advantages, disadvantages, and pricing to make the right choice for your website. Complete 2026 guide.
metadata.ogTitle: Freelance vs Web Agency: How to Choose in 2026
metadata.ogDescription: Freelance or web agency? Compare advantages, disadvantages, and pricing to make the right choice for your website.

hero.title: Freelance vs Web Agency
hero.subtitle: How to choose the right partner for creating your website? Objective comparison to help you decide.

whenChooseFreelance.title: When to choose a freelance?
whenChooseFreelance.subtitle: Freelance is the ideal choice for most web projects for SMEs, liberal professions, and associations.

advantages.title: Unbeatable value for money
advantages.description: Without an agency's structural costs, a freelance offers rates 40 to 60% lower for equivalent quality.

advantages.title: Direct communication
advantages.description: No intermediary. You communicate directly with the person who designs and develops your site, reducing misunderstandings.

advantages.title: Flexibility & responsiveness
advantages.description: A freelance adapts to your schedule and can respond quickly to modification requests, without the heavy processes of an agency.

advantages.title: Personal commitment
advantages.description: Your project isn't just another file among dozens. The freelance is personally committed to your website's success.

whenChooseAgency.title: When to choose an agency?
whenChooseAgency.subtitle: An agency can be relevant in certain specific cases.

advantages.title: Multiple resources
advantages.description: An agency has various specialists (designer, developer, writer, SEO) who can work in parallel.

advantages.title: Large-scale projects
advantages.description: For very complex projects requiring multiple simultaneous expertise, an agency can mobilize a complete team.

advantages.title: Service continuity
advantages.description: In case of absence of a collaborator, the agency ensures project continuity thanks to its team.

whyPerrine.title: The advantages of working with Perrine
whyPerrine.subtitle: The best of both worlds: an agency's technical expertise with a freelance's proximity and rates.

benefits.title: Premium technologies, freelance rate
benefits.description: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS: the same tools as the best agencies, without structural costs.

benefits.title: SEO integrated from the start
benefits.description: Natural SEO is considered from the design phase, not added as an expensive afterthought.

benefits.title: Personalized support from A to Z
benefits.description: From strategy to launch, tailored support at every stage of your project.

benefits.title: Measurable performance
benefits.description: Websites that score 95+ on Google PageSpeed, with concrete results in visibility and conversions.

benefits.title: Total transparency
benefits.description: Detailed quote, clear timeline, regular communication. You always know where your project stands.

items.question: Can a freelance handle a complex project as well as an agency?
items.answer: Absolutely. An experienced freelance masters the entire creation chain (design, development, SEO) and can mobilize specialized collaborators if necessary. For most SME and liberal profession projects, a freelance is not only sufficient but often preferable for client relationship quality.

items.question: What happens if the freelance is no longer available?
items.answer: Clean and well-documented code ensures that any competent developer can take over the project. That's why I use standard technologies (Next.js, React) and provide complete documentation. Your site never depends on a single person.

items.question: How to choose between freelance and agency for my project?
items.answer: If your budget is under $12,000 and you want a single point of contact with a trust relationship, freelance is ideal. If your project requires more than 5 different trades simultaneously (e.g., mobile app + web + marketing), an agency may be relevant.

items.question: Why not simply create my site myself with WordPress?
items.answer: It's possible for very simple needs, but a homemade site will often lack performance, security, and professional SEO. The time you dedicate to it could be better invested in your core business. A professional saves you time and guarantees a result worthy of your image.

cta.title: Convinced by freelance?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project during a first free and no-obligation exchange. You'll see for yourself the advantages of working directly.
